nodes.context: A loose-knit Greek mafia faction consisting of Greek-American racketeers and drug dealers operating in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.
Italian-American organized crime family operating in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.
A criminal gang allied with the Philadelphia Greek Mob according to the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The group was closely affiliated with the Italian-American Philadelphia crime family, and fell under complete control of the family during the reign of Philadelphia Mafia boss Nicky Scarfo.
edges.context: The Philadelphia Greek Mob was closely affiliated with and later fell under complete control of the Philadelphia crime family.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: K&A Gang , Philadelphia crime family
edges.context: The infobox lists the K&A Gang as an ally of the Philadelphia Greek Mob.
